data.content: The worker is not reviewable as shipped: bunx tsc --noEmit fails in src/lib/__tests__/scope-refinement-worker.test.ts:42 and :77, failed jobs are dropped permanently after dequeue in src/lib/scope-refinement-worker.ts:256-299, and runScopeRefinementPrompt() ignores agent-level result errors at src/lib/scope-refinement-worker.ts:168-195.
